abstract: Automated verification skill that audits a target command-line tool against the cli-for-agents 45-rule design catalog. Runs 10 black-box probes covering non-interactive operation, layered help, actionable errors, exit codes, stdin composition, structured output, destructive safety, and command structure; emits findings as a text table, JSON, or NDJSON with per-rule pass/fail and evidence. All probes are read-only by default: safe verbs (list, get, show) may be invoked with bogus flags, while destructive verbs (delete, drop) are only inspected via --help. Includes a self-test that asserts probes detect rule violations on a deliberately-buggy mock CLI. Every script bundled with the skill dog-foods the cli-for-agents rules it checks for.
